results.rendered_html:
asaṃbhava a. Improbable, unlikely; inconsistent; asaṃbhavaṃ hemamṛgasya janma  H. 1. 28. 
— vaḥ
1 Non-existence; rāmeṇāpi kathaṃ na hemahariṇasyāsaṃbhavo lakṣitaḥ  Pt. 2. 4 ;  Śi. 16. 34. 
2 Improbability, impossibility.
— vā, -vaṃ An extraordinary event.
